name: eMANDEVAL Future
users: Researchers and policy analysts evaluating prospective vaccine-mandate designs.
outputs: Predicted public support, expected lives saved, benefit-cost outcomes and comparative policy trade-offs.
basis: Discrete choice evidence from the MandEval programme and scenario-based policy modelling.
citation: Cite as eMANDEVAL Future, Mesfin Genie, MandEval research programme.

name: SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool
developer: Project lead and publisher: Dr Frank Wogbe Agbola; developer/co-developer: Mesfin Genie
problem: Economic evaluation of farm-practice and soil-management interventions.
users: Agricultural researchers, extension teams and project partners comparing trial options.
outputs: Net present value, benefit-cost ratio, return on investment and sensitivity analysis.
basis: Benefit-cost analysis and discounted cash-flow evaluation.
citation: Cite as SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool, CRC High Performance Soils Project 1.2.008.
